emails.subject: Re: Weather Derivative GTC's with Enron Japan Corp. as Counterparty
emails.subject_base: Weather Derivative GTC's with Enron Japan Corp. as Counterparty
emails.body: Mark- Thanks for your prompt response. I know you must be swamped, as usual. As you are likely to be handling the final review of the ISDA documentation that has been produced for use in Japan, I am also forwarding the credit worksheets that have been produced for the three potential Japanese counterparties (Mitsui,Sanwa and IBJ). The credit worksheets were produced by John Suttle. I note, that following correspondence between Jonathan Whitehead and John Suttle, it has been agreed the Mitsui MAC can be BBB+. Please inform me of anything further that I may undertake, to help to expedite the process. Best regards, John Mark Taylor@ECT 08/16/2000 08:44 PM

emails.subject: Re: Weather Derivative GTC's with Enron Japan Corp. as Counterparty
emails.subject_base: Weather Derivative GTC's with Enron Japan Corp. as Counterparty
emails.body: Mark- Thanks for your prompt response. I know you must be swamped, as usual. As you are likely to be handling the final review of the ISDA documentation that has been produced for use in Japan, I am also forwarding the credit worksheets that have been produced for the three potential Japanese counterparties (Mitsui,Sanwa and IBJ). The credit worksheets were produced by John Suttle. I note, that following correspondence between Jonathan Whitehead and John Suttle, it has been agreed the Mitsui MAC can be BBB+. Please inform me of anything further that I may undertake, to help to expedite the process. Best regards, John Mark Taylor@ECT 08/16/2000 08:44 PM
